# seerr_request_retry (Resource)

Retry a failed Seerr media request via `/api/v1/request/{requestId}/retry`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "seerr_request_retry" "failed" {
  request_id = 42
  trigger    = "operator-retry-1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `request_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `trigger` (String) Optional operator-controlled value. Changing it retries the request again.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (Number)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import seerr_request_retry.failed 42
```
